visual_elements.description: Explain the rules and mechanics behind how matrices are multiplied, including considerations of dimensions.
Describe real-world applications where matrix multiplication is essential (e.g., computer graphics, engineering problems).
Illustrate with examples that demonstrate step-by-step calculations for different sizes of square, rectangular, or non-square matrices undergoing multiplication.
Offer an in-depth tutorial on using a software tool to perform and verify matrix multiplications manually calculated by the learner.
